content.text: Task: Plan the complete implementation for making SponJIT no-residual and semantically truthful. The end state is: residual is not a runtime/design category; unsupported opcode/fact cases are not accepted as native stencils; L0 coverage means real semantic coverage; the selector cannot rely on residual stubs for progress; Copy-Link-Patch materialization links only semantically implemented stencils; missing opcode coverage is implemented cleanly in the foundry/native surface rather than hidden behind residuals. Use the accumulated scout and knowledge-builder context. Produce a comprehensive code-level implementation plan across docs, SSA, Stencil IR, native lowering, bank generation, selector, tests, generated artifacts, metrics, and opcode-family coverage. Include sequencing, temporary compatibility gates if unavoidable, verification commands, and final invariants. Do not implement.

SPONJIT_FOUNDRY_SSA.md:36: `FORPREP`/`FORLOOP` and `TFOR*` are not scalar opcodes for the current fact-axis pass. They are structural loop-region boundaries. Until SpongeJIT has paired loop-region lowering with explicit loop edges, full loop-window slotmaps, topology bindings, and edge-sensitive fact transfer, the foundry must not advertise i64 loop fact bundles. Numeric and generic loops therefore remain explicit residual region boundaries, not partially specialized stencils.

-- ssa_lift.lua -- fact-consuming semantic lowering for PUC Lua opcode windows.
--
-- SSA here is the specialization boundary: opcode semantics + facts become a
-- simple canonical core graph. Missing facts or unsupported VM semantics become
-- structured GenericExit nodes; backend gaps are not hidden here.

local Facts = require("src.facts")
local IR = require("src.ssa_ir")

local M = {}

local function factset_of(facts)
    if getmetatable(facts) == Facts.FactSet then return facts end
    return Facts.new(facts or {})
end

local function op_name(x) return type(x) == "table" and tostring(x.op or x.name or x[1] or "?") or tostring(x) end
local function slot_name(n) return n ~= nil and ("R" .. tostring(n)) or "cur" end
local function slot_subject(n) return Facts.slot(slot_name(n)) end
local function k_subject(k) return Facts.value("K" .. tostring(k or 0)) end
local function mkfact(kind, subject, predicate, value) return Facts.fact(kind, subject, predicate, value, "assumed") end

local function implies(g, predicate, subject, value)
    local ok, f = g.factset:implies(predicate, subject, value)
    if ok then return ok, f end
    if predicate == "is_i64" then return g.factset:implies("i64", subject, value) end
    if predicate == "is_table" then return g.factset:implies("table", subject, value) end
    return false, nil
end

local function has_global(g, predicate)
    return implies(g, predicate, Facts.global_subject(), true) or implies(g, predicate, Facts.global_subject())
end

local function has_slot(g, slot, predicate, roles)
    local ss = slot_subject(slot)
    local ok = implies(g, predicate, ss, true) or implies(g, predicate, ss)
    if ok then return true, ss end
    for _, role in ipairs(roles or {}) do
        local vs = Facts.value(role)
        ok = implies(g, predicate, vs, true) or implies(g, predicate, vs)
        if ok then return true, vs end
    end
    return false, ss
end

local function has_k(g, k, predicate)
    local ks = k_subject(k)
    local ok = implies(g, predicate, ks, true) or implies(g, predicate, ks)
    if ok then return true, ks end
    ok = implies(g, predicate, Facts.value("key"), true) or implies(g, predicate, Facts.value("key"))
    if ok then return true, Facts.value("key") end
    return false, ks
end

local function guard(g, value, f, op, pc) return g:guard(value, f, op, pc) end

local function generic_exit(g, opcode, pc, ev, reason)
    g:generic_exit(opcode, pc, { reason = reason or "generic", event = ev })
    return true
end

local function load_slot(g, slot, pc)
    return g:frame_load(slot_name(slot), "TValue", pc)
end

local function i64_from_slot(g, slot, role, pc)
    local ok, subj = has_slot(g, slot, "is_i64", { role or "value", "last" })
    if not ok then return nil end
    local tv = load_slot(g, slot, pc)
    guard(g, tv, mkfact("type", subj, "is_i64"), "GuardTypeI64", pc)
    return g:unbox_i64(tv, pc)
end

local function table_from_slot(g, slot, role, pc, require_shape, require_meta, array_mode)
    local ok, subj = has_slot(g, slot, "is_table", { role or "table", "table" })
    if not ok then return nil end
    local tv = load_slot(g, slot, pc)
    guard(g, tv, mkfact("type", subj, "is_table"), "GuardTable", pc)
    if require_shape then
        local s_ok, s_subj = has_slot(g, slot, "shape_known", { role or "table", "table" })
        if not s_ok then return nil end
        guard(g, tv, mkfact("shape", s_subj, "shape_known", true), "GuardShape", pc)
    end
    if require_meta then
        local m_ok, m_subj = has_slot(g, slot, "metatable_absent", { role or "table", "table" })
        if not m_ok then return nil end
        guard(g, tv, mkfact("metatable", m_subj, "metatable_absent", true), "GuardMetatableAbsent", pc)
    end
    if array_mode then
        local a_ok, a_subj = has_slot(g, slot, "array_hit", { role or "table", "table" })
        local b_ok, b_subj = has_slot(g, slot, "bounds_ok", { role or "table", "table" })
        if not a_ok or not b_ok then return nil end
        guard(g, tv, mkfact("array", a_subj, "array_hit", true), "GuardArrayHit", pc)
        guard(g, tv, mkfact("array", b_subj, "bounds_ok", true), "GuardBounds", pc)
    end
    return tv
end

local function box_store_i64(g, v, dst, pc)
    local boxed = g:box_i64(v, pc)
    g:store_current(boxed, slot_name(dst), pc)
end

local function store_tvalue(g, v, dst, pc)
    g:store_current(v, slot_name(dst), pc)
end

local BIN_RR = { ADD=true, SUB=true, MUL=true, DIV=true, MOD=true, IDIV=true, BAND=true, BOR=true, BXOR=true, SHL=true, SHR=true }
local BIN_RI = { ADDI=true, SHLI=true, SHRI=true }
local BIN_K = { ADDK=true, SUBK=true, MULK=true, MODK=true, POWK=true, DIVK=true, IDIVK=true, BANDK=true, BORK=true, BXORK=true }
local CMP_RR = { EQ=true, LT=true, LE=true }
local CMP_RI = { EQI=true, LTI=true, LEI=true, GTI=true, GEI=true }
local CMP_K = { EQK=true }

local K_TO_BIN = { ADDK="ADD", SUBK="SUB", MULK="MUL", MODK="MOD", DIVK="DIV", IDIVK="IDIV", BANDK="BAND", BORK="BOR", BXORK="BXOR", POWK="POW" }

local NUMERIC_FOR = { FORPREP = true, FORLOOP = true }
local GENERIC_FOR = { TFORPREP = true, TFORCALL = true, TFORLOOP = true }

local function lower_loop_region_boundary(g, op, pc, ev)
    local reason = NUMERIC_FOR[op] and "numeric_for_region_boundary" or "generic_for_region_boundary"
    return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, reason)
end

local function const_k_i64(g, k, pc)
    local ok = has_k(g, k, "const_i64")
    if not ok then return nil end
    return g:const_i64(0, pc) -- runtime value is patched by HOLE in C emitter when sourced from K op
end

local function lower_i64_bin(g, op, pc, ev)
    local lhs = i64_from_slot(g, ev.b, "lhs", pc)
    if not lhs then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_lhs_i64_fact") end
    local rhs, real_op = nil, op
    if BIN_RI[op] then
        rhs = g:const_i64(ev.sc or ev.sC or ev.sb or ev.sB or ev.c or 0, pc)
        real_op = (op == "ADDI") and "ADD" or op
    elseif BIN_K[op] then
        rhs = const_k_i64(g, ev.c or ev.bx or 0, pc)
        if not rhs then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_const_i64_fact") end
        real_op = K_TO_BIN[op] or op
    else
        rhs = i64_from_slot(g, ev.c, "rhs", pc)
        if not rhs then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_rhs_i64_fact") end
    end
    if real_op == "POW" then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "pow_i64_not_lowered") end
    local native
    if real_op == "ADD" then native = g:i64_arith("ADD", lhs, rhs, pc)
    elseif real_op == "SUB" then native = g:i64_arith("SUB", lhs, rhs, pc)
    elseif real_op == "MUL" then native = g:i64_arith("MUL", lhs, rhs, pc)
    else native = g:i64_binop(real_op, lhs, rhs, pc) end
    box_store_i64(g, native, ev.a, pc)
    return false
end

local function lower_i64_cmp(g, op, pc, ev)
    local lhs = i64_from_slot(g, ev.a, "lhs", pc)
    if not lhs then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_lhs_i64_fact") end
    local rhs
    if CMP_RI[op] then
        rhs = g:const_i64(ev.sb or ev.sB or ev.b or 0, pc)
    elseif CMP_K[op] then
        rhs = const_k_i64(g, ev.bx or ev.b or 0, pc)
        if not rhs then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_const_i64_fact") end
    else
        rhs = i64_from_slot(g, ev.b, "rhs", pc)
        if not rhs then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_rhs_i64_fact") end
    end
    local out = g:new_value("I64")
    g:add("CmpI64", { inputs = { lhs, rhs }, outputs = { out }, source = pc, args = { cmp_op = op } })
    box_store_i64(g, out, ev.dest or ev.a, pc)
    return false
end

local function lower_i64_unary(g, op, pc, ev)
    if op ~= "UNM" and op ~= "BNOT" then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "generic_unary") end
    local x = i64_from_slot(g, ev.b, "arg", pc)
    if not x then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_arg_i64_fact") end
    local out = g:i64_unop(op, x, pc)
    box_store_i64(g, out, ev.a, pc)
    return false
end

local function lower_load(g, op, pc, ev)
    if op == "LOADI" then
        box_store_i64(g, g:const_i64(ev.sbx or ev.sBx or ev.bx or 0, pc), ev.a, pc)
    elseif op == "LOADTRUE" or op == "LOADFALSE" or op == "LFALSESKIP" then
        store_tvalue(g, g:const_bool(op == "LOADTRUE", pc), ev.a, pc)
    elseif op == "LOADNIL" then
        store_tvalue(g, g:const_nil(pc), ev.a, pc)
    elseif op == "LOADK" or op == "LOADKX" then
        store_tvalue(g, g:load_const("K" .. tostring(ev.bx or ev.ax or ev.b or 0), pc), ev.a, pc)
    else
        return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "load_form_not_lowered")
    end
    return false
end

local function lower_move(g, pc, ev)
    local v = load_slot(g, ev.b, pc)
    local out = g:new_value("TValue")
    g:add("Move", { inputs = { v }, outputs = { out }, source = pc })
    store_tvalue(g, out, ev.a, pc)
    return false
end

local function lower_field_get(g, op, pc, ev)
    if op == "GETTABUP" then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "upvalue_table_not_lowered") end
    local tab = table_from_slot(g, ev.b, "table", pc, true, true, false)
    if not tab then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_table_shape_facts") end
    local key_ok = has_k(g, ev.c or 0, "key_const")
    if not key_ok then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_key_const_fact") end
    local off_ok = has_k(g, ev.c or 0, "field_offset")
    if not off_ok then off_ok = key_ok end -- coarse key-const payload; curated axes include field_offset explicitly
    if not off_ok then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_field_offset_fact") end
    local v = g:field_load(tab, "K" .. tostring(ev.c or 0), pc)
    store_tvalue(g, v, ev.a, pc)
    if op == "SELF" then
        local recv = load_slot(g, ev.b, pc)
        store_tvalue(g, recv, (ev.a or 0) + 1, pc)
    end
    return false
end

local function maybe_barrier(g, tab, val, pc)
    if not has_global(g, "barrier_clean") then g:barrier(tab, val, pc) end
end

local function lower_field_set(g, op, pc, ev)
    if op == "SETTABUP" then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "upvalue_table_not_lowered") end
    local tab = table_from_slot(g, ev.a, "table", pc, true, true, false)
    if not tab then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_table_shape_facts") end
    local key_ok = has_k(g, ev.b or 0, "key_const")
    if not key_ok then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_key_const_fact") end
    local off_ok = has_k(g, ev.b or 0, "field_offset")
    if not off_ok then off_ok = key_ok end -- coarse key-const payload; curated axes include field_offset explicitly
    if not off_ok then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_field_offset_fact") end
    local val = load_slot(g, ev.c, pc)
    maybe_barrier(g, tab, val, pc)
    g:field_store(tab, "K" .. tostring(ev.b or 0), val, pc)
    return false
end

local function lower_array_get(g, op, pc, ev)
    local tab = table_from_slot(g, ev.b, "table", pc, false, true, true)
    if not tab then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_array_facts") end
    local base_ok = has_slot(g, ev.b, "array_base_offset", { "table" })
    if not base_ok then base_ok = true end -- coarse array payload; curated axes include array_base_offset explicitly
    if not base_ok then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_array_base_fact") end
    local idx
    if op == "GETI" then
        idx = g:const_i64(ev.c or 0, pc)
    else
        idx = i64_from_slot(g, ev.c, "key", pc)
        if not idx then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_key_i64_fact") end
    end
    local v = g:array_load(tab, idx, pc)
    store_tvalue(g, v, ev.a, pc)
    return false
end

local function lower_array_set(g, op, pc, ev)
    local tab = table_from_slot(g, ev.a, "table", pc, false, true, true)
    if not tab then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_array_facts") end
    local base_ok = has_slot(g, ev.a, "array_base_offset", { "table" })
    if not base_ok then base_ok = true end -- coarse array payload; curated axes include array_base_offset explicitly
    if not base_ok then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_array_base_fact") end
    local idx
    if op == "SETI" then
        idx = g:const_i64(ev.b or 0, pc)
    else
        idx = i64_from_slot(g, ev.b, "key", pc)
        if not idx then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_key_i64_fact") end
    end
    local val = load_slot(g, ev.c, pc)
    maybe_barrier(g, tab, val, pc)
    g:array_store(tab, idx, val, pc)
    return false
end

local function lower_call(g, op, pc, ev)
    local ok, subj = has_slot(g, ev.a, "known_call_target", { "callee" })
    if not ok then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "call_boundary") end
    local target_ok = has_slot(g, ev.a, "target_eq", { "callee" })
    if not target_ok then target_ok = ok end -- coarse call-target payload; curated axes include target_eq explicitly
    if not target_ok then return generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "missing_call_target_payload") end
    local fn = load_slot(g, ev.a, pc)
    guard(g, fn, mkfact("call", subj, "known_call_target", true), "GuardCallTarget", pc)
    if op == "TAILCALL" then
        g:add("TailCall", { inputs = { fn }, source = pc, effect = "call", exit = g:exit_projection("tailcall", pc) })
        return true
    end
    local r = g:call("known", fn, pc)
    store_tvalue(g, r, ev.a, pc)
    return false
end

function M.lift(ops, facts, config)
    local fs = factset_of(facts)
    local g = IR.new(fs, config)
    if not fs:ok() then
        g.invalid = true
        g.invalid_reasons = fs:contradictions()
        return g
    end

    for pc, ev in ipairs(ops or {}) do
        local op = op_name(ev)
        local terminal = false
        if op == "MOVE" then terminal = lower_move(g, pc, ev)
        elseif op == "LOADI" or op == "LOADTRUE" or op == "LOADFALSE" or op == "LFALSESKIP" or op == "LOADNIL" or op == "LOADK" or op == "LOADKX" then terminal = lower_load(g, op, pc, ev)
        elseif BIN_RR[op] or BIN_RI[op] or BIN_K[op] then terminal = lower_i64_bin(g, op, pc, ev)
        elseif CMP_RR[op] or CMP_RI[op] or CMP_K[op] then terminal = lower_i64_cmp(g, op, pc, ev)
        elseif op == "UNM" or op == "BNOT" or op == "NOT" or op == "LEN" then terminal = lower_i64_unary(g, op, pc, ev)
        elseif op == "GETFIELD" or op == "GETTABUP" or op == "SELF" then terminal = lower_field_get(g, op, pc, ev)
        elseif op == "SETFIELD" or op == "SETTABUP" then terminal = lower_field_set(g, op, pc, ev)
        elseif op == "GETTABLE" or op == "GETI" then terminal = lower_array_get(g, op, pc, ev)
        elseif op == "SETTABLE" or op == "SETI" then terminal = lower_array_set(g, op, pc, ev)
        elseif op == "CALL" or op == "TAILCALL" then terminal = lower_call(g, op, pc, ev)
        elseif op == "RETURN0" then g:return0(pc); terminal = true
        elseif op == "RETURN" or op == "RETURN1" then g:return1(load_slot(g, ev.a, pc), pc); terminal = true
        elseif op == "JMP" then g:jump(pc, ev); terminal = true
        elseif NUMERIC_FOR[op] or GENERIC_FOR[op] then terminal = lower_loop_region_boundary(g, op, pc, ev)
        else terminal = generic_exit(g, op, pc, ev, "opcode_not_specialized") end
        if terminal then break end
    end
    return g
end

return M

-- stencil_lower.lua -- lower semantic Stencil IR to native stencil descriptors.

local StencilDesc = require("src.stencil_desc")
local Abi = require("src.stencil_abi_x64")
local Projection = require("src.stencil_projection")
local Contract = require("src.ssa_contract")
local NativeX64 = require("src.stencil_native_x64")

local M = {}

local SUPPORTED_OP = {
  LoadSlot = true,
  StoreSlot = true,
  StoreI64Slot = true,
  LoadConst = true,
  ConstNil = true,
  ConstBool = true,
  Move = true,
  GuardI64 = true,
  UnboxI64 = true,
  ConstI64 = true,
  ConstI64Hole = true,
  AddI64 = true,
  SubI64 = true,
  MulI64 = true,
  I64BinOp = true,
  I64UnaryOp = true,
  CmpI64 = true,
  ExitBoundary = true,
  ExitResidual = true,
  ExitUnlowered = true,
}
M.SUPPORTED_OP = SUPPORTED_OP

local SUPPORTED_DATA_ROLE = { slot = true, slot_store = true, imm = true, const = true, bool = true }
M.SUPPORTED_DATA_ROLE = SUPPORTED_DATA_ROLE

local function copy_array(xs)
  local out = {}
  for i, x in ipairs(xs or {}) do out[i] = x end
  return out
end

local function copy_contract(c)
  return {
    selector_sig = c.selector_sig,
    required_sig = c.required_sig,
    checked_sig = c.checked_sig,
    produced_sig = c.produced_sig,
    killed_sig = c.killed_sig,
    deps = copy_array(c.deps),
    exits = copy_array(c.exits),
  }
end

local function standard_locations(kind)
  -- Endpoint contracts are explicit even for the first native byte surface:
  -- entry/success/exit all agree on ctx in rdi and a synced frame in ctx.stack.
  -- Later linked-image endpoints can refine this without changing the public
  -- ABI shape.
  return {
    StencilDesc.location({ kind = "reg", reg = "rdi", value_type = "Ptr", name = "ctx" }),
    StencilDesc.location({ kind = "ctx_field", index = 0, value_type = "Ptr", name = "ctx.stack.synced_frame" }),
    StencilDesc.location({ kind = "immediate", index = kind == "entry" and 1 or 0, value_type = "Bool", name = "abstract_endpoint_contract" }),
  }
end

local function endpoint(endpoints, projections, kind, n)
  local start = #projections + 1
  local p = nil
  if kind ~= "entry" and kind ~= "ok" then
    p = Projection.for_exit(nil, n)
    local ok, perr = Projection.validate_projection(p)
    if not ok then return nil, perr end
    projections[#projections + 1] = p
  end
  local ep = StencilDesc.endpoint({
    kind = kind,
    source = n and n.source,
    exit = n and n.exit,
    contract = "ctx_rdi_synced_frame_abstract_v1",
    locations = standard_locations(kind),
    projection_start = kind ~= "entry" and kind ~= "ok" and start or nil,
    n_projections = kind ~= "entry" and kind ~= "ok" and 1 or 0,
    projections = p and { p } or {},
  })
  endpoints[#endpoints + 1] = ep
  return #endpoints
end

local EXIT_KIND_BY_OP = {
  ExitResidual = "residual_exit",
  ExitBoundary = "boundary_exit",
  ExitUnlowered = "unlowered_exit",
}

function M.lower_result(ssa_result, config)
  config = config or {}
  local errors = {}
  local st = ssa_result and ssa_result.stencil
  if not st then return nil, { "missing stencil" } end

  for _, n in ipairs(st.ops or {}) do
    if not SUPPORTED_OP[n.op] then errors[#errors + 1] = "unsupported native stencil op: " .. tostring(n.op) end
  end

  local contract = Contract.from_result(ssa_result, config.facts or ssa_result.facts or {})
  if #(contract.deps or {}) > 0 then errors[#errors + 1] = "unsupported dependencies in native stencil: " .. table.concat(contract.deps, ",") end

  for _, h in ipairs(st.holes or {}) do
    if h.role_kind == "exit" or h.role_kind == "fail" then
      errors[#errors + 1] = "control endpoint encoded as data hole: " .. tostring(h.role_kind)
    elseif not SUPPORTED_DATA_ROLE[h.role_kind] then
      errors[#errors + 1] = "unsupported native stencil data hole role: " .. tostring(h.role_kind)
    end
  end

  if #errors > 0 then return nil, errors end

  local endpoints, projections = {}, {}
  local exit_endpoint_by_node = {}
  endpoint(endpoints, projections, "entry", nil)
  local ok_endpoint_index = endpoint(endpoints, projections, "ok", nil)

  for _, n in ipairs(st.ops or {}) do
    if n.op == "GuardI64" then
      exit_endpoint_by_node[n.id] = assert(endpoint(endpoints, projections, "guard_exit", n))
    elseif EXIT_KIND_BY_OP[n.op] then
      exit_endpoint_by_node[n.id] = assert(endpoint(endpoints, projections, EXIT_KIND_BY_OP[n.op], n))
    end
  end

  local native, native_errors = NativeX64.emit(st, { exit_endpoint_by_node = exit_endpoint_by_node, ok_endpoint_index = ok_endpoint_index, endpoints = endpoints })
  if not native then return nil, native_errors end

  local abi = Abi.desc()
  local f = StencilDesc.stencil({
    name = "stencil_" .. tostring(ssa_result.stencil_hash or "unknown"),
    physical_abi = Abi.ID,
    pattern_key = ssa_result.stencil_hash,
    len = #(ssa_result.source_ops or st.source_ops or {}),
    executable = true,
    layout = native.layout,
    code_hex = native.code_hex,
    code_size = native.code_size,
    clobbers = copy_array(abi.clobbers),
    endpoints = endpoints,
    data_relocs = native.data_relocs,
    control_relocs = native.control_relocs,
    slotmaps = copy_array(st.slotmaps),
    projections = projections,
    dependencies = copy_array(contract.deps),
    fact_transfer = copy_contract(contract),
    active_node_specs = copy_array(ssa_result.active_node_specs),
    stencil_ops = copy_array(ssa_result.stencil_ops),
    source_ops = copy_array(ssa_result.source_ops or st.source_ops),
  })

  local ok, verrs = StencilDesc.validate_stencil(f)
  if not ok then return nil, verrs end
  f.abi = StencilDesc.lower_to_abi(f)
  return f
end

function M.generate(ssa_result, config)
  local stencil, errors = M.lower_result(ssa_result, config)
  return { ok = stencil ~= nil, stencil = stencil, errors = errors or {} }
end

return M

local function u32(x)
  local n = tonumber(bit.band(x, 0xffffffff)) or 0
  if n < 0 then n = n + 4294967296 end
  return n
end

local function stable_u64_literal(s)
  s = tostring(s or "")
  local hi, lo = 0x811c9dc5, 0x01000193
  for i = 1, #s do
    local b = string.byte(s, i)
    hi = bit.tobit(bit.bxor(hi, b) * 16777619)
    lo = bit.tobit(bit.bxor(lo, b) * 2166136261)
  end
  return string.format("0x%08x%08xULL", u32(hi), u32(lo))
end
M.stable_u64_literal = stable_u64_literal

local function sig_literal(x)
  if type(x) == "table" and x.literal then return tostring(x.literal) end
  if type(x) == "number" then return string.format("0x%016xULL", x) end
  if x == nil then return "0x0000000000000000ULL" end
  return tostring(x)
end

local function u64_parts_from_literal(lit)
  local hex = tostring(lit or ""):match("^0x([%x]+)ULL$") or tostring(lit or ""):match("^0x([%x]+)$") or "0"
  hex = hex:lower()
  if #hex > 16 then hex = hex:sub(#hex - 15) end
  hex = string.rep("0", 16 - #hex) .. hex
  local hi = tonumber(hex:sub(1, 8), 16) or 0
  local lo = tonumber(hex:sub(9, 16), 16) or 0
  return hi, lo
end

local function slot_default_disp(h, addend)

local function make_data_reloc(out, code_offset, reloc_kind, h, addend)
  out[#out + 1] = StencilDesc.data_reloc({
    code_offset = code_offset,

local function op_exit_kind(n)
  if n.op == "GuardI64" then return SPON_EXIT_GUARD end
  if n.op == "ExitResidual" then return SPON_EXIT_RESIDUAL end
  if n.op == "ExitBoundary" then return SPON_EXIT_BOUNDARY end
  if n.op == "ExitUnlowered" then return SPON_EXIT_UNLOWERED end
  return SPON_EXIT_BOUNDARY
end

local function control_edge_kind(n)
  if n.op == "GuardI64" then return "guard_fail" end
  if n.op == "ExitResidual" then return "residual" end
  return "boundary"
end

function M.emit(st, opts)
  opts = opts or {}
  local errors = {}
  local a = new_asm()
  local data_relocs, control_relocs = {}, {}
  local counts = use_counts(st)
  local loc, free = {}, {}
  for _, r in ipairs(REG_POOL) do free[r] = true end

  local function alloc(v)
    for _, r in ipairs(REG_POOL) do
      if free[r] then free[r] = nil; if v then loc[v] = { kind = "reg", reg = r } end; return r end
    end
    errors[#errors + 1] = "native x64 register budget exceeded"
    return nil
  end

  local function free_reg(r)
    if r and r ~= "r11" and REG[r] and not free[r] then free[r] = true end
  end

  local function consume(v)
    if not v then return end
    counts[v] = (counts[v] or 0) - 1
    if counts[v] <= 0 then
      local l = loc[v]
      if l and l.kind == "reg" then free_reg(l.reg) end
    end
  end

  local function input_reg(v)
    local l = loc[v]
    if not l then errors[#errors + 1] = "missing native value location: " .. tostring(v); return nil end
    if l.kind ~= "reg" then errors[#errors + 1] = "native value is not in register: " .. tostring(v); return nil end
    return l.reg
  end

  local function value_ty(v)
    return st.values and st.values[v] and st.values[v].ty or "Unknown"
  end

  local function input_slot(v)
    local l = loc[v]
    if not l then errors[#errors + 1] = "missing native slot value: " .. tostring(v); return nil end
    if l.kind ~= "slot" then errors[#errors + 1] = "native value is not a frame slot: " .. tostring(v); return nil end
    return l.hole
  end

  local function ensure_stub(n)
    local ep_idx = opts.exit_endpoint_by_node and opts.exit_endpoint_by_node[n.id]
    if not ep_idx then errors[#errors + 1] = "missing endpoint for native control op " .. tostring(n.id); return nil end
    return "exit_ep_" .. tostring(ep_idx), ep_idx
  end

  local stubs = {}
  local function record_stub(label, n)
    if not stubs[label] then stubs[label] = n end
  end

  local bool_label_counter = 0
  local function store_tvalue(dst_hole, src_loc, src_value)
    if not dst_hole or not src_loc then return end
    local function dst_reloc(off, addend) make_data_reloc(data_relocs, off, "abs32s", dst_hole, addend) end

    if src_loc.kind == "slot" then
      local sh = src_loc.hole
      local off_src_v = a:mov_r64_m64("rax", "r11", slot_default_disp(sh, 0))
      make_data_reloc(data_relocs, off_src_v, "abs32s", sh, 0)
      local off_dst_v = a:mov_m64_r64("r11", slot_default_disp(dst_hole, 0), "rax")
      dst_reloc(off_dst_v, 0)
      local off_src_t = a:mov_r8_m8("rax", "r11", slot_default_disp(sh, 8))
      make_data_reloc(data_relocs, off_src_t, "abs32s", sh, 8)
      local off_dst_t = a:mov_m8_r8("r11", slot_default_disp(dst_hole, 8), "rax")
      dst_reloc(off_dst_t, 8)

    elseif src_loc.kind == "const_nil" then
      local off_v = a:mov_m64_imm32("r11", slot_default_disp(dst_hole, 0), 0)
      dst_reloc(off_v, 0)
      local off_t = a:mov_m8_imm8("r11", slot_default_disp(dst_hole, 8), 0)
      dst_reloc(off_t, 8)

    elseif src_loc.kind == "const_bool" then
      local off_v = a:mov_m64_imm32("r11", slot_default_disp(dst_hole, 0), 0)
      dst_reloc(off_v, 0)
      local default_tag = (src_loc.default == false) and 1 or 17
      local off_t, imm_off = a:mov_m8_imm8("r11", slot_default_disp(dst_hole, 8), default_tag)
      dst_reloc(off_t, 8)
      make_data_reloc(data_relocs, imm_off, "abs8", src_loc.hole, 0)

    elseif src_loc.kind == "const_pool" then
      local kh = src_loc.hole
      a:mov_r64_m64("r10", "rdi", CTX_K)
      local off_kv = a:mov_r64_m64("rax", "r10", slot_default_disp(kh, 0))
      make_data_reloc(data_relocs, off_kv, "abs32s", kh, 0)
      local off_dv = a:mov_m64_r64("r11", slot_default_disp(dst_hole, 0), "rax")
      dst_reloc(off_dv, 0)
      local off_kt = a:mov_r8_m8("rax", "r10", slot_default_disp(kh, 8))
      make_data_reloc(data_relocs, off_kt, "abs32s", kh, 8)
      local off_dt = a:mov_m8_r8("r11", slot_default_disp(dst_hole, 8), "rax")
      dst_reloc(off_dt, 8)

    elseif src_loc.kind == "reg" and value_ty(src_value) == "I64" then
      local off_v = a:mov_m64_r64("r11", slot_default_disp(dst_hole, 0), src_loc.reg)
      dst_reloc(off_v, 0)
      local off_t = a:mov_m8_imm8("r11", slot_default_disp(dst_hole, 8), LUA_VNUMINT)
      dst_reloc(off_t, 8)

    elseif src_loc.kind == "reg" and value_ty(src_value) == "Bool" then
      local off_v = a:mov_m64_imm32("r11", slot_default_disp(dst_hole, 0), 0)
      dst_reloc(off_v, 0)
      a:test_r64_r64(src_loc.reg)
      local off_false = a:mov_m8_imm8("r11", slot_default_disp(dst_hole, 8), 1)
      dst_reloc(off_false, 8)
      bool_label_counter = bool_label_counter + 1
      local done = "bool_store_done_" .. tostring(bool_label_counter)
      a:jcc32(0x84, done) -- JE: zero/false keeps false tag.
      local off_true = a:mov_m8_imm8("r11", slot_default_disp(dst_hole, 8), 17)
      dst_reloc(off_true, 8)
      a:mark(done)

    else
      errors[#errors + 1] = "unsupported native StoreSlot input: " .. tostring(src_loc.kind) .. ":" .. tostring(value_ty(src_value))
    end
  end

  -- Keep ctx in rdi for the full native stencil. r11 caches ctx->stack.
  a:mov_r64_m64("r11", "rdi", CTX_STACK)

  for _, n in ipairs(st.ops or {}) do
    local op = n.op
    if op == "LoadSlot" then
      for _, v in ipairs(n.outputs or {}) do loc[v] = { kind = "slot", hole = n.hole } end

    elseif op == "LoadConst" then
      for _, v in ipairs(n.outputs or {}) do loc[v] = { kind = "const_pool", hole = n.hole } end

    elseif op == "ConstNil" then
      for _, v in ipairs(n.outputs or {}) do loc[v] = { kind = "const_nil" } end

    elseif op == "ConstBool" then
      for _, v in ipairs(n.outputs or {}) do loc[v] = { kind = "const_bool", hole = n.hole, default = n.args and n.args.value } end

    elseif op == "Move" then
      local src = loc[n.inputs and n.inputs[1]]
      if not src then errors[#errors + 1] = "missing native move input: " .. tostring(n.inputs and n.inputs[1]) end
      for _, v in ipairs(n.outputs or {}) do loc[v] = src end
      for _, v in ipairs(n.inputs or {}) do consume(v) end

    elseif op == "GuardI64" then
      local h = input_slot(n.inputs and n.inputs[1])
      if h then
        local off = a:cmp_m8_imm8("r11", slot_default_disp(h, 8), LUA_VNUMINT)
        make_data_reloc(data_relocs, off, "abs32s", h, 8)
        local label, ep_idx = ensure_stub(n)
        if label then
          local coff = a:jcc32(0x85, label) -- JNE
          control_relocs[#control_relocs + 1] = StencilDesc.control_reloc({
            code_offset = coff,
            code_offset_kind = "x86_64_rel32",
            reloc_kind = "pc32",
            edge_kind = "guard_fail",
            endpoint_index = ep_idx,
            source = n.source,
          })
          record_stub(label, n)
        end
      end
      for _, v in ipairs(n.inputs or {}) do consume(v) end

    elseif op == "UnboxI64" then
      local h = input_slot(n.inputs and n.inputs[1])
      local r = alloc(n.outputs and n.outputs[1])
      if h and r then
        local off = a:mov_r64_m64(r, "r11", slot_default_disp(h, 0))
        make_data_reloc(data_relocs, off, "abs32s", h, 0)
      end
      for _, v in ipairs(n.inputs or {}) do consume(v) end

    elseif op == "ConstI64" then
      local r = alloc(n.outputs and n.outputs[1])
      if r then a:movabs_r64(r, tonumber(n.args and n.args.value) or 0) end

    elseif op == "ConstI64Hole" then
      local r = alloc(n.outputs and n.outputs[1])
      if r then
        local off = a:movabs_r64(r, 0)
        make_data_reloc(data_relocs, off, "abs64", n.hole, 0)
      end

    elseif op == "AddI64" or op == "SubI64" or op == "MulI64" or op == "I64BinOp" then
      local lhs = input_reg(n.inputs and n.inputs[1])
      local rhs = input_reg(n.inputs and n.inputs[2])
      local bop = (op == "AddI64" and "ADD") or (op == "SubI64" and "SUB") or (op == "MulI64" and "MUL") or (n.args and n.args.op)
      local xop = BINOP[bop]
      if not xop then errors[#errors + 1] = "unsupported native x64 i64 binop: " .. tostring(bop)
      elseif lhs and rhs then
        local out = n.outputs and n.outputs[1]
        loc[out] = { kind = "reg", reg = lhs }
        a:bin_r64_r64(xop, lhs, rhs)
      end
      consume(n.inputs and n.inputs[1]); consume(n.inputs and n.inputs[2])

    elseif op == "I64UnaryOp" then
      local src = input_reg(n.inputs and n.inputs[1])
      local uop = n.args and n.args.op
      if src then
        loc[n.outputs and n.outputs[1]] = { kind = "reg", reg = src }
        a:unary_r64(uop, src)
      end
      consume(n.inputs and n.inputs[1])

    elseif op == "CmpI64" then
      local lhs = input_reg(n.inputs and n.inputs[1])
      local rhs = input_reg(n.inputs and n.inputs[2])
      local cc = CMP_CC[n.args and n.args.cmp_op or "EQ"]
      if not cc then errors[#errors + 1] = "unsupported native x64 i64 cmp: " .. tostring(n.args and n.args.cmp_op)
      elseif lhs and rhs then
        loc[n.outputs and n.outputs[1]] = { kind = "reg", reg = lhs }
        a:cmp_r64_r64(lhs, rhs)
        a:setcc_r8(cc, lhs)
        a:movzx_r64_r8(lhs, lhs)
      end
      consume(n.inputs and n.inputs[1]); consume(n.inputs and n.inputs[2])

    elseif op == "StoreSlot" then
      local input = n.inputs and n.inputs[1]
      store_tvalue(n.hole, loc[input], input)
      for _, v in ipairs(n.inputs or {}) do consume(v) end

    elseif op == "StoreI64Slot" then
      local src = input_reg(n.inputs and n.inputs[1])
      local h = n.hole
      if src and h then
        local off_v = a:mov_m64_r64("r11", slot_default_disp(h, 0), src)
        make_data_reloc(data_relocs, off_v, "abs32s", h, 0)
        local off_t = a:mov_m8_imm8("r11", slot_default_disp(h, 8), LUA_VNUMINT)
        make_data_reloc(data_relocs, off_t, "abs32s", h, 8)
      end
      for _, v in ipairs(n.inputs or {}) do consume(v) end

    elseif op == "ExitResidual" or op == "ExitBoundary" or op == "ExitUnlowered" then
      local label, ep_idx = ensure_stub(n)
      if label then
        local coff = a:jmp32(label)
        control_relocs[#control_relocs + 1] = StencilDesc.control_reloc({
          code_offset = coff,
          code_offset_kind = "x86_64_rel32",
          reloc_kind = "pc32",
          edge_kind = control_edge_kind(n),
          endpoint_index = ep_idx,
          source = n.source,
        })
        record_stub(label, n)
      end
      for _, v in ipairs(n.inputs or {}) do consume(v) end

    else
      errors[#errors + 1] = "unsupported native x64 stencil op: " .. tostring(op)
    end
  end

  -- Success is an explicit patchable fallthrough edge. If a materializer does
  -- not patch it, the rel32 targets the local ok endpoint stub below.
  local ok_endpoint_index = opts.ok_endpoint_index or 2
  local ok_label = "ok_ep_" .. tostring(ok_endpoint_index)
  local ok_off = a:jmp32(ok_label)
  control_relocs[#control_relocs + 1] = StencilDesc.control_reloc({
    code_offset = ok_off,
    code_offset_kind = "x86_64_rel32",
    reloc_kind = "pc32",
    edge_kind = "fallthrough",
    endpoint_index = ok_endpoint_index,
    source = 0,
  })

  a:mark(ok_label)
  a:mov_m32_imm32("rdi", CTX_EXIT_KIND, SPON_EXIT_NONE)
  a:ret()

  local labels = {}
  for label in pairs(stubs) do labels[#labels + 1] = label end
  table.sort(labels)
  for _, label in ipairs(labels) do
    local n = stubs[label]
    local source = tonumber(n.source or 0) or 0
    a:mark(label)
    a:mov_m32_imm32("rdi", CTX_EXIT_KIND, op_exit_kind(n))
    a:mov_m32_imm32("rdi", CTX_EXIT_PC, source)
    a:mov_m32_imm32("rdi", CTX_EXIT_OP_IDX, math.max(0, source - 1))
    a:mov_m32_imm32("rdi", CTX_EXIT_HOLE, 0)
    a:ret()
  end

  for _, e in ipairs(errors) do a:error(e) end
  local bytes, ferrs = a:finish()
  if not bytes then return nil, ferrs end

  return {
    bytes = bytes,
    code_hex = bytes_to_hex(bytes),
    code_size = #bytes,
    data_relocs = data_relocs,
    control_relocs = control_relocs,
    layout = {
      mode = "native_bytes",
      executable = true,
      arch = "x86_64",
      encoding = "raw_function_body",
      entry_offset = 0,
      code_size = #bytes,
      fixed_width_patch_sites = true,
    },
  }
end

M.CTX_OFFSETS = {
  stack = CTX_STACK,
  exit_kind = CTX_EXIT_KIND,
  exit_pc = CTX_EXIT_PC,
  exit_op_idx = CTX_EXIT_OP_IDX,
  exit_hole = CTX_EXIT_HOLE,
}

-- build_bank.lua -- Generate a C metadata bank from the global SQLite form DB.
--
-- This consumes build/stencil_bank/stencil_bank.sqlite from build_stencils.sh
-- and emits libsponbank.so exposing the sponbank.h descriptor/selector API.
-- Native stencil rows carry raw byte bodies plus explicit data/control relocs.

package.path = "../../../?.lua;../../../?/init.lua;src/?.lua;src/?/init.lua;" .. package.path

local cjson = require("cjson")
local sqlite3 = require("lsqlite3")
local Util = require("src.util")
local Constants = require("experiments.lua_interpreter_vm.src.constants")

local M = {}

local U32 = 4294967296

local function q(s) return Util.shell_quote(s) end

local function mkdir_p(path) assert(Util.mkdir_p(path), "mkdir failed: " .. tostring(path)) end

local function c_string(s)
  s = tostring(s or "")
  s = s:gsub("\\", "\\\\"):gsub('"', '\\"'):gsub("\n", "\\n"):gsub("\r", "\\r"):gsub("\t", "\\t")
  return '"' .. s .. '"'
end

local function as_c_u64_literal(x)
  if type(x) == "string" and x:match("^0x[%x]+ULL$") then return x end
  if type(x) == "string" and x:match("^0x[%x]+$") then return x .. "ULL" end
  return "0x0000000000000000ULL"
end

local function parse_sig_lohi(lit)
  local hex = tostring(lit or "0"):match("^0x([%x]+)ULL$") or tostring(lit or "0"):match("^0x([%x]+)$") or "0"
  hex = hex:lower()
  if #hex > 16 then hex = hex:sub(#hex - 15) end
  hex = string.rep("0", 16 - #hex) .. hex
  return tonumber(hex:sub(9, 16), 16) or 0, tonumber(hex:sub(1, 8), 16) or 0
end

local function popcount32(x)
  x = tonumber(x) or 0
  local n = 0
  while x > 0 do
    if x % 2 >= 1 then n = n + 1 end
    x = math.floor(x / 2)
  end
  return n
end

local function sig_pop(lit)
  local lo, hi = parse_sig_lohi(lit)
  return popcount32(lo) + popcount32(hi)
end

local OPCODE = {}
for name, value in pairs(Constants.Op or {}) do
  if type(name) == "string" and type(value) == "number" then OPCODE[name] = value end
end

local function op_name(op)
  if type(op) == "table" then return tostring(op.op or "") end
  return tostring(op or "")
end

local function packed_pattern(ops)
  local packed = 0
  for i, op in ipairs(ops or {}) do
    if i > 4 then break end
    local code = OPCODE[op_name(op)] or 0
    packed = packed + code * (256 ^ (i - 1))
  end
  return packed
end

local function selector_key_num(ops)
  local len = #(ops or {})
  return len * U32 + packed_pattern(ops)
end

local function selector_key_lit(ops)
  local len = #(ops or {})
  return string.format("0x%x%08xULL", len, packed_pattern(ops))
end

local function chunk_path(bank_src, name)
  if name:sub(1, 1) == "/" then return name end
  return bank_src .. "/" .. name
end

local function open_inc(out_dir, prefix, suffix)
  local path = string.format("%s/%s_%s.inc", out_dir, prefix, suffix)
  local f = assert(io.open(path, "wb"))
  return f, path
end

local function write_array_header(c, ctype, name, dummy)
  c:write("const ", ctype, " ", name, "[] = {\n")
  if dummy then c:write("  ", dummy, "\n") end
end

local function write_include(c, path)
  c:write('#include "', Util.basename(path), '"\n')
end

local function write_array_footer(c)
  c:write("};\n\n")
end

local function hex_to_bytes(hex)
  if type(hex) ~= "string" then return {} end
  local out = {}
  for pair in hex:gmatch("%x%x") do out[#out + 1] = tonumber(pair, 16) or 0 end
  return out
end

local function u(v) return tonumber(v) or 0 end
local function field(obj, name, default) local v = obj and obj[name]; if v == nil then return default end; return v end

local function emit_index(out_dir, shards, patterns, l0, total_stencils)
  local pattern_keys = {}
  for k, _ in pairs(patterns) do pattern_keys[#pattern_keys + 1] = k end
  table.sort(pattern_keys)

  local c_path = out_dir .. "/bank_index.c"
  local c = assert(io.open(c_path, "wb"))
  c:write("/* Generated by src/build_bank.lua. Native stencil bank index. */\n")
  c:write('#include "sponbank.h"\n#include <stddef.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n\n')

  for _, s in ipairs(shards) do
    local i = s.chunk
    c:write(string.format("extern const SponStencilDesc spon_chunk_%d_stencils[];\n", i))
    c:write(string.format("extern const unsigned char spon_chunk_%d_data[];\n", i))
    c:write(string.format("extern const SponEndpointDesc spon_chunk_%d_endpoints[];\n", i))
    c:write(string.format("extern const SponLocationDesc spon_chunk_%d_locations[];\n", i))
    c:write(string.format("extern const SponDataReloc spon_chunk_%d_data_relocs[];\n", i))
    c:write(string.format("extern const SponControlReloc spon_chunk_%d_control_relocs[];\n", i))
    c:write(string.format("extern const SponSlotMapEntry spon_chunk_%d_slotmaps[];\n", i))
    c:write(string.format("extern const SponProjectionEntry spon_chunk_%d_projections[];\n", i))
    c:write(string.format("extern const SponDependencyDesc spon_chunk_%d_dependencies[];\n", i))
  end

  c:write([[

typedef struct {
  uint32_t first;
  uint32_t count;
  const SponStencilDesc *stencils;
  const unsigned char *data;
  const SponEndpointDesc *endpoints;
  const SponLocationDesc *locations;
  const SponDataReloc *data_relocs;
  const SponControlReloc *control_relocs;
  const SponSlotMapEntry *slotmaps;
  const SponProjectionEntry *projections;
  const SponDependencyDesc *dependencies;
} SponBankShard;

]])

  c:write("static const SponBankShard spon_shards[] = {\n")
  for _, s in ipairs(shards) do
    local i = s.chunk
    c:write(string.format("  {%d, %d, spon_chunk_%d_stencils, spon_chunk_%d_data, spon_chunk_%d_endpoints, spon_chunk_%d_locations, spon_chunk_%d_data_relocs, spon_chunk_%d_control_relocs, spon_chunk_%d_slotmaps, spon_chunk_%d_projections, spon_chunk_%d_dependencies},\n",
      s.first, s.count, i, i, i, i, i, i, i, i, i))
  end
  c:write("};\n")
  c:write(string.format("static const uint32_t spon_shard_count = %d;\n", #shards))
  c:write(string.format("static const uint32_t spon_stencil_count = %d;\n\n", total_stencils))

  c:write("static const SponStencilId spon_l0[256] = {\n")
  for i = 0, 255 do
    if i % 8 == 0 then c:write("  ") end
    c:write(tostring(l0[i] or 0))
    if i ~= 255 then c:write(", ") end
    if i % 8 == 7 then c:write("\n") end
  end
  c:write("};\n\n")

  c:write("typedef struct { uint64_t pattern_key; uint32_t start; uint32_t count; } PatternEntry;\n")
  c:write("static const SponStencilId spon_candidates[] = {\n")
  local candidate_count = 0
  for _, k in ipairs(pattern_keys) do
    local list = patterns[k]
    table.sort(list, function(a, b) return a > b end)
    for _, packed in ipairs(list) do
      local id = math.floor(packed % U32)
      if candidate_count % 12 == 0 then c:write("  ") end
      c:write(tostring(id), ", ")
      candidate_count = candidate_count + 1
      if candidate_count % 12 == 0 then c:write("\n") end
    end
  end
  if candidate_count % 12 ~= 0 then c:write("\n") end
  c:write("};\n")

  c:write("static const PatternEntry spon_patterns[] = {\n")
  local start = 0
  for _, k in ipairs(pattern_keys) do
    local list = patterns[k]
    local len = math.floor(k / U32)
    local packed = math.floor(k - len * U32)
    c:write(string.format("  {0x%x%08xULL, %d, %d},\n", len, packed, start, #list))
    start = start + #list
  end
  c:write("};\n")
  c:write(string.format("static const uint32_t spon_pattern_count = %d;\n\n", #pattern_keys))

  c:write([[
static const SponBankShard *find_shard(SponStencilId id) {
  uint32_t lo = 0, hi = spon_shard_count;
  while (lo < hi) {
    uint32_t mid = lo + ((hi - lo) >> 1);
    const SponBankShard *s = &spon_shards[mid];
    if (id < s->first) hi = mid;
    else if (id >= s->first + s->count) lo = mid + 1;
    else return s;
  }
  return NULL;
}

static const PatternEntry *find_pattern(uint64_t key) {
  uint32_t lo = 0, hi = spon_pattern_count;
  while (lo < hi) {
    uint32_t mid = lo + ((hi - lo) >> 1);
    uint64_t mk = spon_patterns[mid].pattern_key;
    if (mk == key) return &spon_patterns[mid];
    if (mk < key) lo = mid + 1; else hi = mid;
  }

const SponStencilChoice *spon_select_greedy_stats(const uint32_t *bc, uint32_t start, uint32_t end, SponFactSig observed_sig, uint32_t *out_n, SponSelectStats *stats) {
  return select_flow_impl(bc, start, end, 0, observed_sig, 0, NULL, 0, out_n, stats);
}
const SponStencilChoice *spon_select_greedy(const uint32_t *bc, uint32_t start, uint32_t end, SponFactSig observed_sig, uint32_t *out_n) {
  return select_flow_impl(bc, start, end, 0, observed_sig, 0, NULL, 0, out_n, NULL);
}
const SponStencilChoice *spon_select_flow_stats(const uint32_t *bc, uint32_t start, uint32_t end, SponFactSig entry_sig, SponFactSig observed_sig, uint32_t *out_n, SponSelectStats *stats) {
  return select_flow_impl(bc, start, end, entry_sig, observed_sig, 0, NULL, 0, out_n, stats);

const SponStencilChoice *spon_select_flow(const uint32_t *bc, uint32_t start, uint32_t end, SponFactSig entry_sig, SponFactSig observed_sig, uint32_t *out_n) {
  return select_flow_impl(bc, start, end, entry_sig, observed_sig, 0, NULL, 0, out_n, NULL);
}
const SponStencilChoice *spon_select_flow_flags_stats(const uint32_t *bc, uint32_t start, uint32_t end, SponFactSig entry_sig, SponFactSig observed_sig, uint16_t required_stencil_flags, uint32_t *out_n, SponSelectStats *stats) {
  return select_flow_impl(bc, start, end, entry_sig, observed_sig, required_stencil_flags, NULL, 0, out_n, stats);
}
const SponStencilChoice *spon_select_flow_flags(const uint32_t *bc, uint32_t start, uint32_t end, SponFactSig entry_sig, SponFactSig observed_sig, uint16_t required_stencil_flags, uint32_t *out_n) {
  return select_flow_impl(bc, start, end, entry_sig, observed_sig, required_stencil_flags, NULL, 0, out_n, NULL);
}
const SponStencilChoice *spon_select_flow_flags_slots_stats(const uint32_t *bc, uint32_t start, uint32_t end, SponFactSig entry_sig, SponFactSig observed_sig, uint16_t required_stencil_flags, const SponSlotMapEntry *actual_slots, uint32_t n_actual_slots, uint32_t *out_n, SponSelectStats *stats) {
  return select_flow_impl(bc, start, end, entry_sig, observed_sig, required_stencil_flags, actual_slots, n_actual_slots, out_n, stats);
}
const SponStencilChoice *spon_select_flow_flags_slots(const uint32_t *bc, uint32_t start, uint32_t end, SponFactSig entry_sig, SponFactSig observed_sig, uint16_t required_stencil_flags, const SponSlotMapEntry *actual_slots, uint32_t n_actual_slots, uint32_t *out_n) {
  return select_flow_impl(bc, start, end, entry_sig, observed_sig, required_stencil_flags, actual_slots, n_actual_slots, out_n, NULL);
}
]])
  c:close()

  return { patterns = #pattern_keys, candidates = candidate_count, c_file = Util.basename(c_path) }
end

local function emit_sqlite_shard(db, out_dir, shard_index, first_id, last_id, patterns, l0)
  local prefix = string.format("bank_chunk_%d", shard_index)
  local inc = {}
  inc.stencils = select(1, open_inc(out_dir, prefix, "stencils"))
  inc.data_bytes = select(1, open_inc(out_dir, prefix, "data"))
  inc.endpoints = select(1, open_inc(out_dir, prefix, "endpoints"))
  inc.locations = select(1, open_inc(out_dir, prefix, "locations"))
  inc.data_relocs = select(1, open_inc(out_dir, prefix, "data_relocs"))
  inc.control_relocs = select(1, open_inc(out_dir, prefix, "control_relocs"))
  inc.slotmaps = select(1, open_inc(out_dir, prefix, "slotmaps"))
  inc.projections = select(1, open_inc(out_dir, prefix, "projections"))
  inc.dependencies = select(1, open_inc(out_dir, prefix, "dependencies"))

  local counts = {
    stencils = 0,
    bytes = 1,
    endpoints = 0,
    locations = 0,
    data_relocs = 0,
    control_relocs = 0,
    slotmaps = 0,
    projections = 0,
    dependencies = 0,
  }

  local sql = string.format("SELECT bank_id AS id, stencil_json FROM unique_forms WHERE lower_ok = 1 AND stencil_json IS NOT NULL AND bank_id >= %d AND bank_id <= %d ORDER BY bank_id", first_id, last_id)
  for row in db:nrows(sql) do
    local stencil_id = tonumber(row.id)
    local stencil = assert(cjson.decode(row.stencil_json))
    local abi = assert(stencil.abi, "stencil row missing abi")
    local af = assert(abi.stencil, "stencil row missing abi.stencil")
    local len = u(af.len ~= nil and af.len or stencil.len)
    local pattern_lit = as_c_u64_literal(af.pattern_key)
    local selector_sig = as_c_u64_literal(af.selector_sig)
    local required_sig = as_c_u64_literal(af.required_sig)
    local checked_sig = as_c_u64_literal(af.checked_sig)
    local produced_sig = as_c_u64_literal(af.produced_sig)
    local killed_sig = as_c_u64_literal(af.killed_sig)

    local code_bytes = hex_to_bytes(stencil.code_hex or abi.code_hex)
    local byte_start = (#code_bytes > 0) and counts.bytes or 0
    local byte_size = #code_bytes
    local endpoints = abi.endpoints or {}
    local locations = abi.locations or {}
    local data_relocs = abi.data_relocs or {}
    local control_relocs = abi.control_relocs or {}
    local slotmaps = abi.slotmaps or {}
    local projections = abi.projections or {}
    local dependencies = abi.dependencies or {}

    local endpoint_start = (#endpoints > 0) and (counts.endpoints + 1) or 0
    local location_start = (#locations > 0) and (counts.locations + 1) or 0
    local data_reloc_start = (#data_relocs > 0) and (counts.data_relocs + 1) or 0
    local control_reloc_start = (#control_relocs > 0) and (counts.control_relocs + 1) or 0
    local slotmap_start = (#slotmaps > 0) and (counts.slotmaps + 1) or 0
    local projection_start = (#projections > 0) and (counts.projections + 1) or 0
    local dependency_start = (#dependencies > 0) and (counts.dependencies + 1) or 0

    inc.stencils:write(string.format(
      "  {%d, %d, %d, %d, %d, %d, %d, %d, %d, %d, %d, %d, %d, %d, %d, %d, %d, %d, 0, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s}, /* %s */\n",
      stencil_id, byte_start, byte_size, endpoint_start, data_reloc_start, control_reloc_start, slotmap_start, projection_start,
      dependency_start, len, #endpoints, #data_relocs, #control_relocs, #slotmaps, #projections, #dependencies,
      u(af.flags or 1), u(af.physical_abi or 1), pattern_lit, selector_sig, required_sig, checked_sig, produced_sig,
      killed_sig, tostring(stencil.name or "stencil")))

    for i, b in ipairs(code_bytes) do
      if counts.bytes % 16 == 0 then inc.data_bytes:write("  ") end
      inc.data_bytes:write(string.format("0x%02x, ", b))
      counts.bytes = counts.bytes + 1
      if counts.bytes % 16 == 0 then inc.data_bytes:write("\n") end
    end
    if #code_bytes > 0 and counts.bytes % 16 ~= 0 then inc.data_bytes:write("\n") end

    for _, loc in ipairs(locations) do
      inc.locations:write(string.format("  {%d, %d, %d, 0, %d},\n", u(loc.kind), u(loc.value_type), u(loc.reg), u(loc.index)))
      counts.locations = counts.locations + 1
    end
    for _, ep in ipairs(endpoints) do
      local ep_loc_start = u(ep.location_start)
      if ep_loc_start > 0 then ep_loc_start = location_start + ep_loc_start - 1 end
      local ep_proj_start = u(ep.projection_start)
      if ep_proj_start > 0 then ep_proj_start = projection_start + ep_proj_start - 1 end
      inc.endpoints:write(string.format("  {%d, %d, %d, %d, %d, %d, %d},\n", u(ep.kind), u(ep.flags), ep_loc_start, u(ep.n_locations), 0, ep_proj_start, u(ep.n_projections)))
      counts.endpoints = counts.endpoints + 1
    end
    for _, r in ipairs(data_relocs) do
      inc.data_relocs:write(string.format("  {%d, %d, %d, %d, %d, %d},\n", u(r.code_offset), u(r.reloc_kind), u(r.role_kind), u(r.op_idx), u(r.role_arg), u(r.addend)))
      counts.data_relocs = counts.data_relocs + 1
    end
    for _, r in ipairs(control_relocs) do
      inc.control_relocs:write(string.format("  {%d, %d, %d, %d, %d},\n", u(r.code_offset), u(r.reloc_kind), u(r.edge_kind), u(r.endpoint_index), u(r.target_delta)))
      counts.control_relocs = counts.control_relocs + 1
    end
    for _, sm in ipairs(slotmaps) do
      inc.slotmaps:write(string.format("  {%d, %d, %d},\n", u(sm.op_idx), u(sm.logical_slot), u(sm.field_kind)))
      counts.slotmaps = counts.slotmaps + 1
    end
    for _, p in ipairs(projections) do
      inc.projections:write(string.format("  {%d, %d, %d, %d, %d},\n", u(p.kind), u(p.value_type), u(p.logical_slot), u(p.value_index), u(p.pc)))
      counts.projections = counts.projections + 1
    end
    for _, d in ipairs(dependencies) do
      inc.dependencies:write(string.format("  {%s},\n", c_string(d.name or d[1] or "")))
      counts.dependencies = counts.dependencies + 1
    end

    counts.stencils = counts.stencils + 1
    if counts.stencils % 10000 == 0 then io.stderr:write(string.format("[bank] shard %d stencils=%d\n", shard_index, counts.stencils)) end
  end
  for _, f in pairs(inc) do f:close() end

  local c_path = string.format("%s/%s.c", out_dir, prefix)
  local c = assert(io.open(c_path, "wb"))
  c:write("/* Generated by src/build_bank.lua. Native stencil bank shard. */\n")
  c:write('#include "sponbank.h"\n#include <stddef.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n\n')
  write_array_header(c, "SponStencilDesc", string.format("spon_chunk_%d_stencils", shard_index), nil)
  write_include(c, string.format("%s_%s.inc", prefix, "stencils")); write_array_footer(c)
  write_array_header(c, "unsigned char", string.format("spon_chunk_%d_data", shard_index), "0,")
  write_include(c, string.format("%s_%s.inc", prefix, "data")); write_array_footer(c)
  write_array_header(c, "SponEndpointDesc", string.format("spon_chunk_%d_endpoints", shard_index), "{0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0},")
  write_include(c, string.format("%s_%s.inc", prefix, "endpoints")); write_array_footer(c)
  write_array_header(c, "SponLocationDesc", string.format("spon_chunk_%d_locations", shard_index), "{0, 0, 0, 0, 0},")
  write_include(c, string.format("%s_%s.inc", prefix, "locations")); write_array_footer(c)
  write_array_header(c, "SponDataReloc", string.format("spon_chunk_%d_data_relocs", shard_index), "{0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0},")
  write_include(c, string.format("%s_%s.inc", prefix, "data_relocs")); write_array_footer(c)
  write_array_header(c, "SponControlReloc", string.format("spon_chunk_%d_control_relocs", shard_index), "{0, 0, 0, 0, 0},")
  write_include(c, string.format("%s_%s.inc", prefix, "control_relocs")); write_array_footer(c)
  write_array_header(c, "SponSlotMapEntry", string.format("spon_chunk_%d_slotmaps", shard_index), "{0, 0, 0},")
  write_include(c, string.format("%s_%s.inc", prefix, "slotmaps")); write_array_footer(c)
  write_array_header(c, "SponProjectionEntry", string.format("spon_chunk_%d_projections", shard_index), "{0, 0, 0, 0, 0},")
  write_include(c, string.format("%s_%s.inc", prefix, "projections")); write_array_footer(c)
  write_array_header(c, "SponDependencyDesc", string.format("spon_chunk_%d_dependencies", shard_index), "{NULL},")
  write_include(c, string.format("%s_%s.inc", prefix, "dependencies")); write_array_footer(c)
  c:close()

  return {
    chunk = shard_index,
    first = first_id,
    count = counts.stencils,
    bytes = counts.bytes,
    endpoints = counts.endpoints,
    locations = counts.locations,
    data_relocs = counts.data_relocs,
    control_relocs = counts.control_relocs,
    slotmaps = counts.slotmaps,
    projections = counts.projections,
    dependencies = counts.dependencies,
    c_file = Util.basename(c_path),
  }
end

local function add_pattern_candidate(patterns, l0, ops, stencil_id, selector_sig)
  local pattern_num = selector_key_num(ops)
  local score = sig_pop(selector_sig)
  local list = patterns[pattern_num]
  if not list then list = {}; patterns[pattern_num] = list end
  list[#list + 1] = score * U32 + stencil_id

  if #(ops or {}) == 1 then
    local opcode = OPCODE[op_name(ops[1])] or nil
    if opcode and opcode >= 0 and opcode < 256 then
      if selector_sig == "0x0000000000000000ULL" or not l0[opcode] then l0[opcode] = stencil_id end
    end
  end
end

local function load_pattern_aliases(db, patterns, l0)
  local n = 0
  local sql = [[SELECT u.bank_id AS id, u.selector_sig AS selector_sig, p.ops_json AS ops_json
    FROM unique_forms u JOIN form_patterns p ON p.dedupe_key = u.dedupe_key
    WHERE u.lower_ok = 1 AND u.stencil_json IS NOT NULL AND u.bank_id IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY p.ops_key, u.id]]
  for row in db:nrows(sql) do
    add_pattern_candidate(patterns, l0, assert(cjson.decode(row.ops_json)), tonumber(row.id), as_c_u64_literal(row.selector_sig))
    n = n + 1
    if n % 100000 == 0 then io.stderr:write(string.format("[bank] loaded %d pattern aliases\n", n)) end
  end
  return n
end

-- worker_compile.lua — One parallel worker: SSA compile + stencil normal forms.
-- Usage: luajit src/worker_compile.lua <chunk_id>
--
-- Workers run the foundry semantic pass only:
--   opcode sequence + facts -> SSA -> canonical normal form.
-- They do not lower descriptors. Global unique final forms are merged and lowered
-- once by dedupe_normal_forms.lua before C bank generation.

package.path = 'src/?.lua;src/?/init.lua;' .. package.path

local cjson = require("cjson")
local sqlite3 = require("lsqlite3")
local SSA = require("src.ssa")
local Contract = require("src.ssa_contract")
local Util = require("src.util")
local FactAxes = require("src.ssa_fact_axes")

local ci = tonumber(arg[1])
assert(ci, "usage: luajit src/worker_compile.lua <chunk_id>")

local config = {
  max_fact_combos = tonumber(os.getenv("MAX_FACT_COMBOS") or "0") or 0,
  fact_axis_mode = tostring(os.getenv("FACT_AXIS_MODE") or "curated"),
}
local progress_every = tonumber(os.getenv("WORKER_PROGRESS_SEQS") or "1000") or 1000

local tmpdir = os.getenv("SPON_TMP") or "/tmp"
local function tmp(name) return tmpdir .. "/" .. name end
local seqs = Util.read_json(tmp("grammar_chunk_" .. ci .. ".json"))

io.stderr:write(string.format("[W%d] START seqs=%d fact_mode=%s max_fact_combos=%s\n",
  ci, #seqs, config.fact_axis_mode, tostring(config.max_fact_combos)))

local function op_signature(ops)
  local parts = {}
  for _, op in ipairs(ops or {}) do parts[#parts + 1] = type(op) == "table" and tostring(op.op) or tostring(op) end
  return table.concat(parts, "|")
end

local function contract_key(contract)
  return table.concat({
    tostring(contract.selector_sig and contract.selector_sig.literal or ""),
    tostring(contract.required_sig and contract.required_sig.literal or ""),
    tostring(contract.checked_sig and contract.checked_sig.literal or ""),
    tostring(contract.produced_sig and contract.produced_sig.literal or ""),
    tostring(contract.killed_sig and contract.killed_sig.literal or ""),
  }, "|")
end

local db_path = tmp("grammar_worker_" .. ci .. ".sqlite")
os.remove(db_path)
local db = assert(sqlite3.open(db_path))
assert(db:exec([[
PRAGMA journal_mode = OFF;
PRAGMA synchronous = OFF;
PRAGMA temp_store = MEMORY;
PRAGMA locking_mode = EXCLUSIVE;
CREATE TABLE forms (
  dedupe_key TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  stencil_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
  contract_key TEXT NOT NULL,
  selector_sig TEXT NOT NULL,
  count INTEGER NOT NULL,
  form_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  ssa_json TEXT NOT NULL
);
CREATE TABLE patterns (
  dedupe_key TEXT NOT NULL,
  ops_key TEXT NOT NULL,
  ops_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  count INTEGER NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY(dedupe_key, ops_key)
);
CREATE TABLE stats (
  key TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  value INTEGER NOT NULL
);
BEGIN IMMEDIATE;
]]) == sqlite3.OK)

local insert_form = assert(db:prepare([[INSERT INTO forms
  (dedupe_key, stencil_hash, contract_key, selector_sig, count, form_json, ssa_json)
  VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)]]))
local bump_form = assert(db:prepare([[UPDATE forms SET count = count + 1 WHERE dedupe_key = ?]]))
local insert_pattern = assert(db:prepare([[INSERT INTO patterns
  (dedupe_key, ops_key, ops_json, count) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
  ON CONFLICT(dedupe_key, ops_key) DO UPDATE SET count = count + excluded.count]]))

local function step_done(stmt)
  local rc = stmt:step()
  if rc ~= sqlite3.DONE then error(db:errmsg()) end
  stmt:reset()
end

local forms_seen = {}
local lc, lssa_ok, nforms = 0, 0, 0

for si, ops in ipairs(seqs) do
  local subsets = FactAxes.subsets(FactAxes.axes_for_ops(ops), config)
  for _, facts in ipairs(subsets) do
    local r = SSA.compile(ops, facts, config)
    lc = lc + 1
    if r.ok then
      lssa_ok = lssa_ok + 1
      local contract = Contract.from_result(r, facts)
      local ckey = contract_key(contract)
      local normal_key = tostring(r.stencil_hash)
      -- Equivalence is the SSA-consumed canonical normal form. The contract is
      -- retained as descriptor metadata for the chosen representative, but it is
      -- not part of the dedupe key: source facts/opcodes are aliases of the form.
      local dedupe_key = normal_key
      local ops_key = op_signature(ops)

      insert_pattern:bind_values(dedupe_key, ops_key, cjson.encode(ops), 1)
      step_done(insert_pattern)

      if forms_seen[dedupe_key] then
        bump_form:bind_values(dedupe_key)
        step_done(bump_form)
      else
        nforms = nforms + 1
        forms_seen[dedupe_key] = true
        local form = {
          key = normal_key,
          dedupe_key = dedupe_key,
          stencil_hash = r.stencil_hash,
          stencil_form = r.stencil_form,
          stencil_key = r.stencil_key,
          stencil_ops = r.stencil_ops,
          stencil_slotmaps = r.slotmaps,
          ops = ops,
          facts = facts,
          contract = contract,
          count = 1,
          changed = r.changed,
          source_ops = ops,
        }
        local ssa_payload = {
          stencil = r.stencil,
          stencil_hash = r.stencil_hash,
          stencil_key = r.stencil_key,
          stencil_ops = r.stencil_ops,
          slotmaps = r.slotmaps,
          active_node_specs = r.active_node_specs,
          checked_facts = r.checked_facts,
          deps = r.deps,
          projection = r.projection,
          source_ops = ops,
          facts = facts,
        }
        local selector_sig = tostring(contract.selector_sig and contract.selector_sig.literal or "0x0000000000000000ULL")
        insert_form:bind_values(dedupe_key, normal_key, ckey, selector_sig, 1, cjson.encode(form), cjson.encode(ssa_payload))
        step_done(insert_form)
      end
    end
  end
  if progress_every > 0 and (si % progress_every == 0 or si == #seqs) then
    io.stderr:write(string.format("[W%d] %d/%d compiles=%d ssa_ok=%d unique_forms=%d\n", ci, si, #seqs, lc, lssa_ok, nforms))
  end
end

insert_form:finalize()
bump_form:finalize()
insert_pattern:finalize()
local stats = assert(db:prepare([[INSERT INTO stats(key, value) VALUES (?, ?)]]))
local ssa_rejected = lc - lssa_ok
for _, kv in ipairs({
  {"seqs", #seqs},
  {"compiles", lc},
  {"ok", lssa_ok},
  {"ssa_ok", lssa_ok},
  {"rejected", ssa_rejected},
  {"forms", nforms},
  {"stencils", 0},
}) do
  stats:bind_values(kv[1], kv[2])
  step_done(stats)
end
stats:finalize()
assert(db:exec("COMMIT; CREATE INDEX forms_stencil_hash_idx ON forms(stencil_hash); CREATE INDEX patterns_ops_key_idx ON patterns(ops_key);") == sqlite3.OK)
db:close()

io.stderr:write(string.format("[W%d] DONE seqs=%d compiles=%d ssa_ok=%d rejected=%d unique_forms=%d db=%s\n", ci, #seqs, lc, lssa_ok, ssa_rejected, nforms, db_path))

-- dedupe_normal_forms.lua -- Global foundry normal-form merge + unique lowering.
--
-- This is the semantic boundary that the monolithic foundry implies:
--   opcode sequence + facts -> SSA consumes semantics -> canonical normal form
--   -> global equivalence class -> lower one representative to the descriptor bank.
--
-- Per-worker DBs contain normal forms and pattern aliases. This script merges
-- equivalent forms across workers, lowers each unique final form once, and keeps
-- all source-pattern aliases so the C selector can map many opcode sequences to
-- the same unique bank id.

package.path = 'src/?.lua;src/?/init.lua;' .. package.path

local cjson = require("cjson")
local sqlite3 = require("lsqlite3")
local Util = require("src.util")
local StencilLower = require("src.stencil_lower")
local StencilDesc = require("src.stencil_desc")

local chunks = tonumber(arg[2] or os.getenv("CHUNKS") or "128") or 128
local out_path = arg[3] or (tmpdir .. "/stencil_bank.sqlite")

local function worker_path(ci) return tmpdir .. "/grammar_worker_" .. ci .. ".sqlite" end

local function step_done_for(db, stmt)
  local rc = stmt:step()
  if rc ~= sqlite3.DONE then error(db:errmsg()) end
  stmt:reset()
end

local function numeric_key_map(t)
  if type(t) ~= "table" then return t end
  local out = {}
  for k, v in pairs(t) do out[tonumber(k) or k] = v end
  return out
end

local function rehydrate_ssa_payload(p)
  p = p or {}
  local st = p.stencil or {}
  st.slot_class_by_concrete = numeric_key_map(st.slot_class_by_concrete)
  st.slot_concrete_by_class = st.slot_concrete_by_class or {}
  p.stencil = st
  return p
end

local db = assert(sqlite3.open(out_path))
assert(db:exec([[

assert(db:exec([[
CREATE INDEX unique_forms_stencil_hash_idx ON unique_forms(stencil_hash);
CREATE INDEX unique_forms_count_idx ON unique_forms(count);
CREATE INDEX unique_forms_bank_id_idx ON unique_forms(bank_id);
CREATE INDEX form_patterns_ops_key_idx ON form_patterns(ops_key);
CREATE INDEX form_patterns_dedupe_key_idx ON form_patterns(dedupe_key);
BEGIN IMMEDIATE;
]]) == sqlite3.OK)

local update_lower = assert(db:prepare([[UPDATE unique_forms
  SET lower_ok = ?, bank_id = ?, stencil_json = ?, lower_errors_json = ? WHERE id = ?]]))
local unique_forms, lowered_stencils, lower_rejected = 0, 0, 0
for row in db:nrows("SELECT id, form_json, ssa_json FROM unique_forms ORDER BY id") do
  unique_forms = unique_forms + 1
  local id = tonumber(row.id)
  local form = assert(cjson.decode(row.form_json))
  local ssa = rehydrate_ssa_payload(assert(cjson.decode(row.ssa_json)))
  local lower = StencilLower.generate(ssa, { facts = form.facts or ssa.facts or {} })
  if lower.ok then
    local stencil = lower.stencil
    lowered_stencils = lowered_stencils + 1
    stencil.stencil_id = lowered_stencils
    stencil.abi = StencilDesc.lower_to_abi(stencil)
    update_lower:bind_values(1, lowered_stencils, cjson.encode(stencil), nil, id)
  else
    update_lower:bind_values(0, nil, nil, cjson.encode(lower.errors or {}), id)
    lower_rejected = lower_rejected + 1
  end
  step_done_for(db, update_lower)
  if unique_forms % 50000 == 0 then
    io.stderr:write(string.format("[dedupe] lowered %d unique forms, stencils=%d rejected=%d\n", unique_forms, lowered_stencils, lower_rejected))
  end
end
update_lower:finalize()
assert(db:exec("COMMIT;") == sqlite3.OK)

local pattern_aliases = 0
for row in db:nrows("SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM form_patterns") do pattern_aliases = tonumber(row.n) or 0 end

local stat_stmt = assert(db:prepare("INSERT INTO bank_stats(key, value) VALUES (?, ?)"))
local function stat(k, v)
  stat_stmt:bind_values(k, v or 0)
  step_done_for(db, stat_stmt)
end

stat("seqs", totals.seqs)
stat("compiles", totals.compiles)
stat("ok", totals.ok)
stat("ssa_ok", totals.ssa_ok)
stat("ssa_rejected", totals.rejected)
stat("worker_unique_forms", totals.forms)
stat("unique_forms", unique_forms)
stat("lowered_stencils", lowered_stencils)
stat("lower_rejected", lower_rejected)
stat("pattern_aliases", pattern_aliases)
stat_stmt:finalize()
db:close()

io.stderr:write(string.format("[dedupe] DONE chunks=%d compiles=%d worker_forms=%d unique_forms=%d lowered_stencils=%d pattern_aliases=%d db=%s\n",
  chunks, totals.compiles, totals.forms, unique_forms, lowered_stencils, pattern_aliases, out_path))
